hooks.prompt: If a wiki/ directory exists in the current project and any files in raw/ were added or modified during this task, do not silently rewrite the wiki. Instead, note that new sources are waiting in raw/ and offer the normal interactive INGEST workflow: discuss key takeaways with the user, ask what to emphasize, then update the wiki only if they want to proceed. If no raw/ changes or no wiki/ exists, do nothing.
